report.summary: F&G collapsed to 12 (Extreme Fear) — down from 29 last cycle. 3 agents ran since v10: Build v12 scaffolded 2 learn guides (Jito MEV/LST, Mantle Network), Publish v7 promoted 5 orphan pages to 713 total published slugs. BTC ~$66,934 (flat). Production FROZEN at e3f63fc — 43rd escalation. Extreme fear = prime accumulation signal; 130 staging pages trapped.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA v10 → v11: 3 agents ran since last standup (build v12, publish v7, this standup). No community, design, or eod cycle.

BUILD v12: Researched + scaffolded 2 learn guides — Jito Protocol Solana MEV & Liquid Staking Guide 2026 (970 lines, $2.92B TVL, JitoSOL 7.2-7.8% APY, 94% validator share) and Mantle Network MNT Layer 2 Ecosystem Guide 2026 (725 lines, $2.8B TVL, ZK rollup migration, 180+ dApps). Both target high-intent DeFi keywords.

PUBLISH v7: Promoted 5 pages from orphan pool — governance-tracker, whale-alert-tracker, eigenlayer ecosystem, seed-phrase-explained, staking-apy. Total published slugs now 713. QA flagged: 0/5 have JSON-LD, only 2/5 have proper meta tags. Rate limiter still only on /health.

MACRO SHIFT: F&G Index CRASHED to 12 (Extreme Fear) — down from 29 at last cycle. This is the lowest sustained trough since Terra-Luna collapse (Jun 2022, bottomed at 6). Historically, readings below 15 precede major accumulation phases within 30-90 days. BTC ~$66,934 (+0.48% 24h). Market cap ~$2.38T. BTC dominance 56.2% (flight to quality).

NEWS: Leap Wallet shutting down May 28 (migration urgency). Russia requiring crypto wallet declarations from Jul 1. Chainlink unlocked 19M LINK (~$165M). Binance launching stock perpetuals Apr 7. Grayscale amended Bittensor Trust S-1.
EGRESS: Sandbox blocks CoinGecko, GSC, Vercel Analytics. Market data confirmed via web search.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE OUTPUT: 3 agents ran since v10. Build scaffolded 2 pages (1,695 combined lines), Publish promoted 5 orphan pages (713 total published).
TODAY'S TOTAL: 47 agent runs (standup×10, build×10, community×10, design×8, eod×7, publish×2 + this standup). ~$4,221 human-equivalent cost.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (43rd ESCALATION): Production frozen at e3f63fc since Apr 2. Now 139+ uncommitted files. F&G crashing to 12 (Extreme Fear) means we're entering a historically significant accumulation zone — 'how to buy the dip', 'DCA strategy', 'crypto passive income' queries all spike during extreme fear. We have 24 guides built today + 130 in staging that cannot capture this traffic. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED.

P1 — QUEUE REFILL: Publish queue still exhausted (2 entries needing page.tsx: monad-guide, zora). Build v12 added 2 more guides. Orphan pool down to ~629. Need scaffold for monad + zora to unblock queue, then batch-refill 50.

P2 — SEO QA GAP: Publish v7 promoted 5 pages but QA showed 0/5 have JSON-LD structured data, only 2/5 have meta tags. Older orphan pages lack the SEO quality of new build-cycle pages. Consider prioritizing new learn guides over orphan pool for publishing.
P3 — TECHNICAL DEBT: 111 phantom published slugs (missing page.tsx → 404s). 141 TS errors in 4 files (non-blocking). 0/6 API routes rate-limited. Rate limiter only wired to /api/health.
P4 — CARRY-OVER: jupiter-dex-aggregator use-client/metadata bug. mev-guide, solana-vs-ethereum warn status. 4 tool pages (token-radar, risk-score, sentiment-heatmap, market-recap).
BLOCKERS: Deploy authorization remains sole blocker. All other work accumulates in staging.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0, 43rd ESCALATION): F&G crashed from 29 → 12 (Extreme Fear) since last cycle. This is a CRITICAL moment — extreme fear historically triggers massive 'how to' and 'what to buy' search volume spikes. We have 24 guides built today and 130 in staging that are invisible to Google. The NFP jobs beat (178K vs 60K) from earlier today creates a macro divergence: strong economy + extreme crypto fear = institutional accumulation window. Search queries for 'crypto passive income', 'DCA calculator', 'best crypto to buy in fear' will spike. Deploy cost: $0. Deploy ROI: compounding daily as pages get indexed.

PRIORITY 2 — CAPITALIZE ON EXTREME FEAR CONTENT: Fear markets are our best content market. Queue tweets #540 (passive income) and #544 (weekend signal) immediately — update #544 to reflect F&G 12 instead of 29. The passive income guide, DCA calculator, and fear & greed tool are our highest-converting pages in this sentiment regime. Community should draft a 'Extreme Fear = Extreme Opportunity' thread with historical F&G recovery data.

PRIORITY 3 — SEO QUALITY OVER QUANTITY IN PUBLISHING: Publish v7 revealed orphan pool pages have poor SEO (0/5 JSON-LD, 2/5 meta tags). Next publish cycle should prioritize recent build-cycle pages (Jito, Mantle, Passive Income, Linea) which have full SEO markup over orphan pool scraps. Quality indexing > quantity. Scaffold monad + zora to clear queue blockers.
